IotDeviceService/src/main/java/com/anton.general_idea: Add the final modifier to the main method parameter for immutability.
IotDeviceService/src/main/java/com/anton.human_impl: public static void main(final String[] args)

IotDeviceService/pom.xml.general_idea: Introduce Spring Cloud dependency management to handle transitive dependencies for cloud-native components.
Add Netflix Eureka client dependency to enable service discovery capabilities.
Add Spring Boot validation starter to support Bean Validation annotations.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence via JPA.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver to connect to the PostgreSQL database.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter to generate API documentation and Swagger UI.
Explicitly add Jackson Databind dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Jackson module for parameter names to support reflection-based parameter name discovery.
Add Jackson datatype module for JSR-310 to handle Java 8+ date/time types.
Add Jackson datatype module for JDK 8 to handle Optional and other JDK 8 types.
Add Spring Kafka dependency to enable integration with Apache Kafka.

UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Introduce Spring Cloud dependency management to handle cloud-related library versions.
Add Netflix Eureka client dependency to enable service discovery capabilities.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency to generate API documentation UI.
Add Spring Boot validation starter to support Bean Validation annotations.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence layer.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add Spring Security starter to implement authentication and authorization.
Add JJWT API dependency for handling JSON Web Tokens.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization of JWTs.
Add Spring Security test dependency to facilitate testing of secured endpoints.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.

IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace the project-specific Maven wrapper execution with the standard Maven command provided by the builder image.
Add an environment variable to configure the active Spring profile at runtime.
Update the Java startup command to pass the Spring profile via a system property derived from the environment variable.

UserService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace the Maven wrapper execution with the standard Maven command available in the new builder image.
Add an environment variable to define the active Spring profile for the container.
Update the startup command to pass the Spring profile via a JVM system property.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Eclipse Mosquitto service to support MQTT5 communication for IoT devices.
Add Zookeeper service as a dependency for Kafka coordination.
Add Kafka service to handle event streaming and real-time data processing.
Add PostgreSQL database service for persistent data storage.
Add Eureka Server service for service discovery in the microservices architecture.
Add API Gateway service to route external requests to internal microservices.
Add gRPC Server service to handle high-performance internal communication.
Add pgAdmin service for database administration and monitoring.
Add MQTT Client service to interact with the MQTT broker.
Add Real Time Data Service to process and manage real-time data streams.
Define a custom bridge network to isolate and connect all microservices.
Define named volumes for persistent data storage across container restarts.
Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Docker Compose.
